scripts.build:zip: mkdir -p dist && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./manifest.json').version") && rm -f "dist/marc21-viewer-$VERSION.zip" && zip -r "dist/marc21-viewer-$VERSION.zip" manifest.json background.js viewer.html viewer.js marc-parser.js marc-labels.js icons LICENSE && echo "Byggde dist/marc21-viewer-$VERSION.zip"
